title: Becoming an Agile Coach
description:
As an agile coach, you'll shift between different stances based on what the situation calls for. A "stance" is the role or approach you choose—such as facilitating, teaching, leading, or advising—to help people navigate challenges and move toward greater effectiveness as a team. 

This self-paced course explores each stance in depth, preparing you to guide teams and leaders through agile adoption hurdles, resistance to change, everyday conflicts, and other obstacles on the path to continuous improvement:

Facilitating
Teaching
Mentoring
Advising
Leading
Coaching

You'll gain the confidence to navigate complex roadblocks, ignite continuous improvement, and shape resilient, high-performing teams. If you've ever wanted to lead transformations with skill, empathy, and impact, this is where you begin.
